name: nulvexor
description: Nulvexor is a secure, temporary, and database-free chat platform designed for \"burn after reading\" communication. Users can join rooms using 6-character codes. Messages are encrypted client-side using a variety of ciphers and stored on the server momentarily inside JSON files. A predefined burn timer (10s, 30s, 60s, or 5m) dictates exactly when messages are scrubbed from the server forever.

scripts.start: echo 'Nulvexor PHP app - started with Apache (Render Docker)'
